title: The Dark Knight
cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart
description: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations that plague the streets. The partnership proves to be effective, but they soon find themselves prey to a reign of chaos unleashed by a rising criminal mastermind known to the terrified citizens of Gotham as the Joker.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
cast: Tom Hardy, Charlize Theron, Nicholas Hoult
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

title: John Wick
cast: Keanu Reeves, Michael Nyqvist, Alfie Allen
description: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and stole his car. John Wick is a retired hitman who is forced back into the criminal underworld when a Russian gangster's son steals his car and kills his dog.

title: Gladiator
cast: Russell Crowe, Joaquin Phoenix, Connie Nielsen
description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery. Maximus is betrayed by the emperor's corrupt son, Commodus, and the son's father, Marcus Aurelius.

title: Die Hard
cast: Bruce Willis, Alan Rickman, Bonnie Bedelia
description: An NYPD officer tries to save his wife and several others taken hostage by German terrorists during a Christmas party at the Nakatomi Plaza in Los Angeles.

title: Avengers: Endgame
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Mark Ruffalo
description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

title: Inception
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O., but his tragic past may doom the project and his team to disaster.

title: The Matrix
cast: Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss
description: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth: the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
cast: Tom Cruise, Miles Teller, Jennifer Connelly
description: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him.

title: Casino Royale
cast: Daniel Craig, Eva Green, Judi Dench
description: Armed with a license to kill, Secret Agent James Bond sets out on his first mission as 007. Bond must defeat a private banker funding terrorists in a high-stakes game of poker at Casino Royale, Montenegro.

title: Money Heist
cast: Álvaro Morte, Itziar Ituño, Pedro Alonso
description: A criminal mastermind who goes by 'The Professor' has a plan to pull off the biggest heist in recorded history. To carry out the ambitious plan, he recruits eight people with certain abilities and who have nothing to lose.

title: Reacher
cast: Alan Ritchson, Malcolm Goodwin, Willa Fitzgerald
description: When military police investigator Jack Reacher is arrested for a murder he did not commit, he finds himself in the middle of a deadly conspiracy full of dirty cops, shady businessmen and scheming politicians.

title: The Punisher
cast: Jon Bernthal, Amber Rose Revah, Ben Barnes
description: After the murder of his family, marine veteran Frank Castle becomes the vigilante known as 'The Punisher', with only one goal in mind: to avenge them.

cast: Kiefer Sutherland, Mary Lynn Rajskub
description: Jack Bauer, a field agent for the Counter Terrorist Unit of Los Angeles, tries to save the nation from terrorist threats while also dealing with the betrayal of his colleagues within the CTU.

title: Daredevil
cast: Charlie Cox, Vincent D'Onofrio, Deborah Ann Woll
description: A blind lawyer by day, Matt Murdock uses his other senses to fight injustice as the masked vigilante Daredevil in New York's Hell's Kitchen neighborhood.

title: Jack Ryan
cast: John Krasinski, Wendell Pierce, Ali Suliman
description: CIA analyst Jack Ryan uncovers a pattern in terrorist communication that launches him into the center of a dangerous gambit with a new breed of terrorism.

title: Prison Break
cast: Wentworth Miller, Dominic Purcell
description: Due to a political conspiracy, an innocent man is sent to death row and his only hope is his brother, who makes it his mission to deliberately get himself sent to the same prison in order to break the both of them out.

title: Vikings
cast: Travis Fimmel, Katheryn Winnick, Gustaf Skarsgård
description: The adventures of Ragnar Lothbrok, the greatest hero of his age. The series tells the sagas of Ragnar's band of Viking brothers and his family, as he rises to become King of the Viking tribes.

title: Arrow
cast: Stephen Amell, Katie Cassidy, David Ramsey
description: Spoiled billionaire playboy Oliver Queen is missing and presumed dead when his yacht is lost at sea. He returns five years later a changed man, determined to clean up the city as a hooded vigilante armed with a bow.

title: Banshee
cast: Antony Starr, Ivana Miličević, Ulrich Thomsen
description: An ex-con assumes the identity of a murdered sheriff in Banshee, Pennsylvania, where he continues his criminal activities, while also trying to reconnect with his former lover.

title: Superbad
cast: Jonah Hill, Michael Cera, Christopher Mintz-Plasse
description: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry.

title: The Hangover
cast: Bradley Cooper, Zach Galifianakis, Ed Helms
description: Three buddies wake up from a bachelor party in Las Vegas, with no memory of the previous night and the bachelor missing. They make their way around the city in order to find their friend before his wedding.

title: Home Alone
cast: Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern
description: An 8-year-old troublemaker must protect his house from a pair of burglars when he is accidentally left home alone by his family during Christmas vacation.

title: 3 Idiots
cast: Aamir Khan, R. Madhavan, Sharman Joshi
description: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion. They revisit their college days and recall the memories of their friend who inspired them to think differently.

title: Deadpool
cast: Ryan Reynolds, Morena Baccarin, Ed Skrein
description: A fast-talking mercenary with a morbid sense of humor is subjected to a rogue experiment that leaves him with accelerated healing powers and a quest for revenge.

title: Rush Hour
cast: Jackie Chan, Chris Tucker
description: A loyal and dedicated Hong Kong Inspector teams up with a reckless and loudmouthed LAPD detective to rescue the Chinese Consul's kidnapped daughter.

title: Jumanji
cast: Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart
description: Four teenagers are sucked into a magical video game, and the only way they can escape is to work together to finish the game.

title: Dumb and Dumber
cast: Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels
description: The cross-country adventures of two good-hearted but incredibly stupid friends, Lloyd and Harry, who set out on a quest to find a woman Lloyd had fallen for.

title: The Mask
cast: Jim Carrey, Cameron Diaz
description: Bank clerk Stanley Ipkiss is transformed into a manic superhero when he wears a mysterious mask. Suddenly, the fun-loving character gets a chance to woo the girl of his dreams.

title: Free Guy
cast: Ryan Reynolds, Jodie Comer, Joe Keery
description: A bank teller called Guy realizes he is a background character in an open world video game called Free City that will soon go offline.

title: Friends
cast: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
description: Follows the personal and professional lives of six twenty to thirty-something-year-old friends living in Manhattan.

title: The Office
cast: Steve Carell, Rainn Wilson, John Krasinski
description: A mockumentary on a group of typical office workers, where the workday consists of ego clashes, inappropriate behavior, and tedium.

title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
cast: Andy Samberg, Stephanie Beatriz, Terry Crews
description: Jake Peralta, an immature but talented NYPD detective in Brooklyn's 99th Precinct, comes into immediate conflict with his new commanding officer, the serious and stern Raymond Holt.

title: How I Met Your Mother
cast: Josh Radnor, Jason Segel, Cobie Smulders
description: A father recounts to his children, through a series of flashbacks, the journey he and his four best friends took leading up to him meeting their mother.

title: Modern Family
cast: Ed O'Neill, Sofia Vergara, Julie Bowen
description: Three different but related families face trials and tribulations in their own uniquely comedic ways.

title: Mr. Bean
cast: Rowan Atkinson
description: The childlike Mr. Bean solves various problems presented by everyday tasks and often causes disruption in the process.

title: Young Sheldon
cast: Iain Armitage, Zoe Perry, Lance Barber
description: The early life of child genius Sheldon Cooper is explored in this prequel to The Big Bang Theory, set in East Texas in the late 1980s.

title: The Big Bang Theory
cast: Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco
description: A woman who moves into an apartment across the hall from two brilliant but socially awkward physicists shows them how little they know about life outside of the laboratory.

title: Wednesday
cast: Jenna Ortega, Gwendoline Christie, Riki Lindhome
description: Smart, sarcastic and a little dead inside, Wednesday Addams investigates a murder spree while making new friends and enemies at Nevermore Academy.

title: Community
cast: Joel McHale, Gillian Jacobs, Danny Pudi
description: A group of students band together at a community college. The series focuses on a study group that forms at Greendale Community College.

title: The Conjuring
cast: Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson, Ron Livingston
description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse. Forced to confront a powerful entity, the Warrens find themselves caught in the most terrifying case of their lives.

title: It
cast: Bill Skarsgård, Jaeden Martell, Finn Wolfhard
description: In the summer of 1989, a group of bullied kids band together to destroy a shape-shifting monster, which disguises itself as a clown and preys on the children of Derry, their small Maine town.

title: A Quiet Place
cast: Emily Blunt, John Krasinski, Millicent Simmonds
description: A family is forced to live in near silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee are determined to find a way to protect their children.

title: The Exorcist
cast: Ellen Burstyn, Max von Sydow, Linda Blair
description: When a teenage girl is possessed by a mysterious entity, her mother seeks the help of two priests to save her daughter.

title: Insidious
cast: Patrick Wilson, Rose Byrne, Ty Simpkins
description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

title: Hereditary
cast: Toni Collette, Alex Wolff, Milly Shapiro
description: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter's family begins to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry.

title: Get Out
cast: Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford
description: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, where his simmering uneasiness about their reception of him eventually reaches a boiling point.

title: The Nun
cast: Taissa Farmiga, Demián Bichir, Jonas Bloquet
description: A priest with a haunted past and a novitiate on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate the death of a young nun in Romania.

title: Smile
cast: Sosie Bacon, Jessie T. Usher, Kyle Gallner
description: After witnessing a bizarre, traumatic incident involving a patient, Dr. Rose Cotter starts experiencing frightening occurrences that she can't explain.

title: The Ring
cast: Naomi Watts, Martin Henderson, Brian Cox
description: A journalist must investigate a mysterious videotape which seems to cause the death of anyone one week to the day after they watch it.

title: Stranger Things
cast: Millie Bobby Brown, Finn Wolfhard, Winona Ryder
description: When a young boy disappears, his mother, a police chief and his friends must confront terrifying supernatural forces in order to get him back.

title: The Haunting of Hill House
cast: Michiel Huisman, Elizabeth Reaser, Oliver Jackson-Cohen
description: Flashing between past and present, a fractured family confronts haunting memories of their old home and the terrifying events that drove them from it.

title: From
cast: Harold Perrineau, Catalina Sandino Moreno
description: Unravels the mystery of a nightmarish town that traps all those who enter. As the unwilling residents fight to keep a sense of normalcy and search for a way out, they must also survive the threats of the surrounding forest.

title: All of Us Are Dead
cast: Park Ji-hu, Yoon Chan-young, Cho Yi-hyun
description: A high school becomes ground zero for a zombie virus outbreak. Trapped students must fight their way out or turn into one of the rabid infected.

title: Wednesday
cast: Jenna Ortega, Gwendoline Christie
description: Smart, sarcastic and a little dead inside, Wednesday Addams investigates a murder spree while making new friends and enemies at Nevermore Academy.

title: The Walking Dead
cast: Andrew Lincoln, Norman Reedus, Melissa McBride
description: Sheriff Deputy Rick Grimes wakes up from a coma to find a post-apocalyptic world dominated by flesh-eating zombies. He sets out to find his family and encounters many other survivors along the way.

title: Sweet Home
cast: Song Kang, Lee Jin-uk, Lee Si-young
description: A reclusive teenager is forced to leave his home to face the horrors of a world turned upside down, where he must fight monsters that are after humans.

title: The Last of Us
cast: Pedro Pascal, Bella Ramsey, Anna Torv
description: Joel, a hardened survivor, is hired to smuggle Ellie, a 14-year-old girl, out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey.

title: Midnight Mass
cast: Kate Siegel, Zach Gilford, Hamish Linklater
description: A small, isolated island community experiences miraculous events and frightening omens after the arrival of a mysterious young priest.

title: Marianne
cast: Victoire Du Bois, Lucie Boujenah
description: A famous horror writer returns to her hometown and discovers that the demon who inspired her novels is real and is targeting the people she loves.

title: Haunting of Bly Manor
cast: Victoria Pedretti, Oliver Jackson-Cohen
description: An au pair finds herself at the center of supernatural occurrences when she takes a job caring for two orphaned children at a remote English estate.

title: Interstellar
cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival. When Earth's future is threatened by a catastrophic blight and famine, a former NASA pilot leads a mission through a wormhole.

title: Blade Runner 2049
cast: Ryan Gosling, Harrison Ford, Ana de Armas
description: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.

title: Avatar
cast: Sam Worthington, Zoe Saldana, Sigourney Weaver
description: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.

title: Dune
cast: Timothée Chalamet, Rebecca Ferguson, Oscar Isaac
description: Feature adaptation of Frank Herbert's science fiction novel, about the son of a noble family entrusted with the protection of the most valuable asset and most vital element in the galaxy.

title: Arrival
cast: Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner, Forest Whitaker
description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world.

title: Star Wars
cast: Mark Hamill, Harrison Ford, Carrie Fisher
description: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight, a cocky pilot, a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the Empire's world-destroying battle station.

title: The Martian
cast: Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig
description: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assumes him dead and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal that he is alive.

title: Gravity
cast: Sandra Bullock, George Clooney
description: A medical engineer and an astronaut work together to survive after a catastrophe destroys their shuttle and leaves them adrift in orbit.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
cast: Tom Cruise, Emily Blunt, Bill Paxton
description: A soldier fighting aliens gets to relive the same day over and over again, the day restarting every time he dies.

title: Looper
cast: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Bruce Willis, Emily Blunt
description: In 2074, when the mob wants to get rid of someone, the target is sent into the past, where a hired gun awaits - someone like Joe - who one day learns the mob wants to 'close the loop' by sending back Joe's future self for assassination.

title: Dark
cast: Louis Hofmann, Oliver Masucci, Maja Schöne
description: A family saga with a supernatural twist, set in a German town, where the disappearance of two young children exposes the relationships among four families.

title: Black Mirror
cast: Various
description: An anthology series exploring a twisted, high-tech multiverse where humanity's greatest innovations and darkest instincts collide.

title: Loki
cast: Tom Hiddleston, Sophia Di Martino, Owen Wilson
description: The mercurial villain Loki resumes his role as the God of Mischief in a new series that takes place after the events of Avengers: Endgame.

title: The Mandalorian
cast: Pedro Pascal, Carl Weathers, Gina Carano
description: The travels of a lone bounty hunter in the outer reaches of the galaxy, far from the authority of the New Republic.

title: The Last of Us
cast: Pedro Pascal, Bella Ramsey
description: Joel, a hardened survivor, is hired to smuggle Ellie, a 14-year-old girl, out of an oppressive quarantine zone across a post-pandemic America.

title: Westworld
cast: Evan Rachel Wood, Anthony Hopkins, Ed Harris
description: Set at the intersection of the near future and the reimagined past, explore a world in which every human appetite can be indulged without consequence.

title: Lost in Space
cast: Molly Parker, Toby Stephens, Maxwell Jenkins
description: After crash-landing on an alien planet, the Robinson family fight against all odds to survive and escape, but they're surrounded by hidden dangers.

title: Foundation
cast: Jared Harris, Lee Pace, Lou Llobell
description: A band of exiles embark on a monumental journey to save the remnants of civilization as an increasingly violent galactic empire crumbles.

title: Doctor Who
cast: David Tennant, Matt Smith, Jodie Whittaker
description: The further adventures in time and space of the alien adventurer known as the Doctor and their companions from planet Earth.

title: Severance
cast: Adam Scott, Zach Cherry, Britt Lower
description: Mark leads a team of office workers whose memories have been surgically divided between their work and personal lives. When a mysterious colleague appears, he must confront the true nature of his work.

title: Toy Story
cast: Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles
description: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's room.

title: Frozen
cast: Idina Menzel, Kristen Bell, Jonathan Groff
description: When the newly crowned Queen Elsa accidentally uses her power to turn things into ice to curse her home in infinite winter, her sister Anna teams up with a mountain man, his playful reindeer, and a snowman to change the weather.

title: Coco
cast: Anthony Gonzalez, Gael García Bernal, Benjamin Bratt
description: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ancestral ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

title: Finding Nemo
cast: Albert Brooks, Ellen DeGeneres, Alexander Gould
description: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
cast: Shameik Moore, Jake Johnson, Hailee Steinfeld
description: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe, and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.

title: Kung Fu Panda
cast: Jack Black, Dustin Hoffman, Angelina Jolie
description: The Dragon Warrior has to clash against the savage Tai Lung as China's fate hangs in the balance. However, the Dragon Warrior mantle is supposedly mistaken to be bestowed upon an obese panda who is a kung fu fanatic.

title: Up
cast: Ed Asner, Jordan Nagai, John Ratzenberger
description: 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen travels to Paradise Falls in his house equipped with balloons, inadvertently taking a young stowaway.

title: Inside Out
cast: Amy Poehler, Bill Hader, Mindy Kaling
description: After young Riley is uprooted from her Midwest life and moved to San Francisco, her emotions - Joy, Fear, Anger, Disgust and Sadness - conflict on how best to navigate a new city, house, and school.

title: Shrek
cast: Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz
description: After his swamp is filled with magical creatures, Shrek agrees to rescue Princess Fiona for a villainous lord in order to get his land back.

title: Moana
cast: Auli'i Cravalho, Dwayne Johnson, Rachel House
description: In Ancient Polynesia, when a terrible curse incurred by the Demigod Maui reaches Moana's island, she answers the Ocean's call to seek out Maui to set things right.

title: Arcane
cast: Hailee Steinfeld, Ella Purnell, Vi
description: Set in the utopian region of Piltover and the oppressed underground of Zaun, the story follows the origins of two iconic League of Legends champions.

title: Rick and Morty
cast: Justin Roiland, Chris Parnell, Spencer Grammer
description: An elderly and slightly corrupted scientist, Rick, brings his grandson, Morty, on crazy inter-dimensional adventures.

title: Ben 10
cast: Tara Strong, Meagan Smith, Paul Eiding
description: On a road trip, 10-year-old Ben Tennyson discovers a mysterious watch that can transform him into 10 different aliens with extraordinary powers.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
cast: Zach Tyler, Mae Whitman, Jack DeSena
description: In a war-torn world of elemental magic, a young boy reawakens to undertake a dangerous mystic quest to fulfill his destiny as the Avatar.

title: Tom and Jerry
cast: Tom (Cat), Jerry (Mouse)
description: The never-ending rivalry between Tom the cat and Jerry the mouse is filled with comedic chases and hilarious gags.

title: Naruto
cast: Junko Takeuchi, Maile Flanagan, Kate Higgins
description: Naruto Uzumaki, a young ninja rejected by his village because of the demon fox sealed within him, determines to become the greatest ninja ever and dreams of being Hokage.

title: One Piece
cast: Mayumi Tanaka, Tony Beck, Laurent Vernin
description: Follows the adventures of Monkey D. Luffy and his pirate crew in order to find the greatest treasure ever left by the legendary Pirate, Gold Roger.

title: Dragon Ball Z
cast: Masako Nozawa, Ryô Horikawa
description: After learning that he is from another planet, a warrior named Goku and his friends are prompted to defend it from an onslaught of extraterrestrial enemies.

title: Attack on Titan
cast: Yuki Kaji, Yui Ishikawa, Marina Inoue
description: After his hometown is destroyed and his mother is killed, young Eren Yeager vows to cleanse the earth of the giant humanoid Titans that have brought humanity to the brink of extinction.

title: Demon Slayer
cast: Natsuki Hanae, Zach Aguilar, Akari Kitô
description: A family is slaughtered by a demon. Tanjiro Kamado and his sister Nezuko are the only survivors. This begins Tanjiro's saga to become a demon slayer and help his sister turn human again.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton
description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Forrest Gump
cast: Tom Hanks, Robin Wright, Gary Sinise
description: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the events of Vietnam, Watergate, and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

title: Fight Club
cast: Brad Pitt, Edward Norton, Helena Bonham Carter
description: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.

title: The Godfather
cast: Marlon Brando, Al Pacino, James Caan
description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: Titanic
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet, Billy Zane
description: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.

title: Whiplash
cast: Miles Teller, J.K. Simmons, Melissa Benoist
description: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.

title: Joker
cast: Joaquin Phoenix, Robert De Niro, Zazie Beetz
description: In Gotham City, mentally troubled comedian Arthur Fleck is disregarded and mistreated by society. He then embarks on a downward spiral of revolution and bloody crime. This path brings him face-to-face with his alter-ego: the Joker.

title: Parasite
cast: Kang-ho Song, Lee Sun-kyun, Cho Yeo-jeong
description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: A Beautiful Mind
cast: Russell Crowe, Ed Harris, Jennifer Connelly
description: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

title: The Green Mile
cast: Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse
description: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder and rape, yet who has a mysterious gift.

title: Breaking Bad
cast: Bryan Cranston, Aaron Paul, Anna Gunn
description: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with inoperable lung cancer turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine in order to secure his family's future.

title: Better Call Saul
cast: Bob Odenkirk, Jonathan Banks, Rhea Seehorn
description: The trials and tribulations of criminal lawyer Jimmy McGill in the time before he established his strip-mall law office in Albuquerque.

title: Game of Thrones
cast: Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington, Peter Dinklage
description: Nine noble families fight for control over the lands of Westeros, while an ancient enemy returns after being dormant for millennia.

title: Peaky Blinders
cast: Cillian Murphy, Paul Anderson, Helen McCrory
description: A gangster family epic set in 1900s England, centering on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps, and their fierce boss Tommy Shelby.

title: Sherlock
cast: Benedict Cumberbatch, Martin Freeman
description: A modern update finds the famous sleuth and his doctor partner solving crime in 21st century London.

title: House of the Dragon
cast: Matt Smith, Emma D'Arcy, Eve Best
description: An internal succession war within House Targaryen at the height of its power, 172 years before the birth of Daenerys Targaryen.

title: Suits
cast: Gabriel Macht, Patrick J. Adams, Meghan Markle

title: The Crown
cast: Claire Foy, Olivia Colman, Imelda Staunton

title: Euphoria
cast: Zendaya, Hunter Schafer, Jacob Elordi
description: A group of high school students navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

title: Narcos
cast: Wagner Moura, Boyd Holbrook, Pedro Pascal

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt

description: An open-world RPG where you play as Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter in a dark fantasy world. One of the greatest games ever made.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
cast: Rockstar Games
description: An epic tale of life in America's unforgiving heartland. The game's vast and atmospheric world sets the stage for a story of outlaws on the run.

title: The Last of Us Part I
cast: Sony
description: A masterful remake of the 2013 classic. Joel and Ellie journey across a post-apocalyptic America in a story about love, loss and survival.

title: God of War (2018)
cast: Sony
description: Kratos and his son Atreus journey through the Norse realms. A breathtaking reinvention of the franchise with emotional depth and stunning combat.

cast: Bandai Namco
description: Created by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin, Elden Ring is an open-world souls-like set in the shattered Lands Between.

description: Link awakens in a ruined Hyrule and must stop Calamity Ganon. A revolutionary open-world adventure that redefined the genre.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
cast: Larian Studios

title: Counter-Strike 2
cast: Valve
description: The next generation of the world's most played competitive FPS. New engine, updated maps and improved mechanics in CS2.

title: Grand Theft Auto V
cast: Rockstar Games

cast: 2K Games

title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
cast: Capcom

title: Minecraft
cast: Microsoft
description: The best-selling game of all time. Mine, craft, build and survive in an infinite procedurally generated world with endless possibilities.

title: EA Sports FC 25
cast: Electronic Arts
description: The world's most popular football game now rebranded as EA Sports FC. Ultimate Team, Career Mode and new FC IQ tactical system.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II
cast: Activision
description: Task Force 141 returns in a globe-trotting war story. Stunning visuals, improved gunplay and a massive multiplayer suite.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
cast: CD Projekt
description: In Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, V becomes the ultimate mercenary. Phantom Liberty DLC made this a true masterpiece.

title: Fortnite
cast: Epic Games
description: 100 players fight to be the last one standing. Fortnite's ever-evolving world, building mechanics and live events made it a cultural phenomenon.
platform: PC, PS4, PS5, Xbox, Switch, Mobile

title: Mortal Kombat 1
cast: Warner Bros.
description: Liu Kang reshapes the universe in this reboot. Brutal fatalities, kameo fighters and the deepest story mode in franchise history.

title: Forza Horizon 5
cast: Microsoft
description: The best open-world racing game set in Mexico. Hundreds of cars, stunning visuals and a massive diverse map with volcanoes, jungle and beaches.

title: Spider-Man 2
cast: Sony
description: Peter Parker and Miles Morales face Venom and Kraven the Hunter. The most ambitious Spider-Man game with incredible web-swinging across NYC.

title: The Sims 4
cast: Electronic Arts
description: Create and control people in a simulated world. Build houses, pursue careers, form relationships and live out countless stories.

title: StarCraft II
cast: Blizzard
description: The definitive sci-fi RTS. Command Terran, Zerg or Protoss forces in a story spanning three epic campaigns and one of the world's biggest esports.

title: Dark Souls III
cast: Bandai Namco
description: The epic conclusion to the Dark Souls trilogy. Face grueling bosses, uncover lore hidden in item descriptions and triumph over despair.

title: Alien: Isolation
cast: Sega
description: Amanda Ripley investigates the fate of her mother aboard a remote space station. A masterpiece of survival horror with the perfect Alien AI.

title: Valorant
cast: Riot Games
description: A 5v5 tactical shooter where agents with unique abilities battle for control. Precise gunplay meets character skills in Riot's competitive FPS.

title: Portal 2
cast: Valve
description: Use portal guns to solve mind-bending puzzles in Aperture Science. With brilliant co-op mode and hilarious writing, Portal 2 is a masterpiece.

title: Assassin's Creed Mirage
cast: Ubisoft
description: Return to the roots of the series in 9th century Baghdad. Basim hones his skills as an assassin in a focused, stealth-driven adventure.

title: NBA 2K25
cast: 2K Sports
description: The latest installment of the premier basketball simulation. Updated rosters, improved gameplay and the popular MyCareer and MyTeam modes.

title: No Man's Sky
cast: Hello Games
description: Explore an infinite procedurally generated universe with 18 quintillion planets. No Man's Sky went from disaster to one of gaming's greatest redemptions.

title: Horizon Forbidden West
cast: Sony
description: Aloy ventures into the Forbidden West to fight a blight threatening the planet. Stunning open world filled with towering machines and tribal cultures.

title: Gran Turismo 7
cast: Sony
description: The most authentic racing simulator on console. 400+ cars, stunning tracks and GT Sophy AI make this the ultimate driving experience.

title: Street Fighter 6
cast: Capcom
description: A new era for the legendary fighting franchise. World Tour mode, Battle Hub and the Drive System make SF6 the best in the series.

title: Final Fantasy XVI
cast: Square Enix
description: Clive Rosfield fights to free the world of Valisthea from powerful Dominants who wield Eikons. A mature, cinematic action RPG epic.

title: Dead Space Remake
cast: Electronic Arts
description: Isaac Clarke dismembers Necromorphs aboard the USG Ishimura in this stunning remake. Seamless experience with zero loading screens.

title: Age of Empires IV
cast: Microsoft
description: Command civilizations through history from the Dark Age to the Imperial Age. Stunning visuals and historical documentary videos between missions.

title: Microsoft Flight Simulator
cast: Microsoft
description: Fly anywhere on Earth with photorealistic satellite imagery and real weather. The most realistic flight simulation ever made.

title: It Takes Two
cast: EA
description: A couple on the verge of divorce must work together in this wildly inventive co-op adventure. Won Game of the Year 2021.

title: PUBG: Battlegrounds
cast: Krafton
description: 100 players parachute onto an island and fight to be the last one alive. The game that launched the battle royale genre.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
cast: Sony
description: Jin Sakai defends Tsushima Island from the Mongol invasion. A visually stunning samurai epic with incredible combat and a beautiful open world.

title: Apex Legends
cast: EA
description: Legendary characters with unique abilities team up to battle for glory in the Apex Games. The most polished battle royale with best-in-class movement.
platform: PC, PS4, PS5, Xbox, Switch, Mobile

title: WWE 2K24
cast: 2K Sports
description: The most complete WWE game ever. 200+ superstars, Showcase mode, MyGM and the biggest roster in franchise history.

title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
cast: Activision
description: A shinobi fights to rescue his kidnapped master and restore his honor in feudal Japan. Precise, demanding swordplay at its finest.

title: Stardew Valley
cast: ConcernedApe
description: Inherit your grandfather's farm and build a new life in Pelican Town. A charming, relaxing farming RPG with deep relationships and secrets.

title: F1 24
cast: EA Sports
description: The official Formula 1 game with all 2024 teams and drivers. Enhanced handling model, Career mode and immersive F1 World.

title: Tetris Effect: Connected
cast: Enhance
description: Tetris like you've never seen or heard it before. A mind-bending, deeply immersive experience with music and visuals that sync to your play.

title: Tekken 8
cast: Bandai Namco
description: The epic clash between father and son continues. Stunning visuals, the Heat system and a massive roster make Tekken 8 the best in the series.

title: XCOM 2
cast: 2K Games
description: Earth has fallen to alien occupation. Lead a resistance force in guerrilla warfare, manage your base and protect humanity's last hope.

title: Outlast II
cast: Red Barrels
description: Blake Langermann investigates a murder in the Arizona desert and finds a deranged religious cult. The most terrifying horror game ever made.

title: Terraria
cast: Re-Logic
description: Dig, fight, explore and build in a 2D world filled with dangers and treasures. Over 30 bosses and hundreds of hours of content.

title: Warzone 2.0
cast: Activision
description: The new era of Call of Duty's free-to-play battle royale. Al Mazrah map, new circle mechanics and integrated DMZ extraction mode.
